task_completion.description: Open the sensitive employee roster file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor window (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) displaying the 'employee_roster_sensitive.odt' file, showing a list of employee records with names, SSNs, and emails.
SSNs in the document are modified so that the first five digits are replaced by 'XXX-XX-', leaving only the last four digits visible (e.g., 'XXX-XX-1234').
Email addresses in the document are modified so that their domain part is replaced with '@redacted.com' (e.g., 'firstname.lastname@redacted.com').

task_completion.description: Apply yellow highlight to modified PII
task_completion.visual_evidence: A yellow background color (highlight) is applied specifically to the modified SSNs and email addresses in the document.

task_completion.description: Save the sanitized file to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the file being saved as 'roster_sanitized.odt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or the word processor window title updated to 'roster_sanitized.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to edit the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications and highlighting should be done within a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) using its built-in tools (e.g., Find & Replace), rather than a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows should be visible running scripts (Python, bash, sed, etc.) to automatically modify the underlying XML of the ODT file.

integrity.description: The highlight is a genuine formatting change
integrity.visual_evidence: The yellow highlight must be an actual text background color change applied via the word processor's formatting tools, not a typed text annotation like '[YELLOW]'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: '/home/ga/Documents/employee_roster_sensitive.odt' (contains 50 records). Output file: '/home/ga/Documents/roster_sanitized.odt'. SSNs must be masked to 'XXX-XX-####' and emails to '*@redacted.com'. Both modified SSNs and emails must have yellow highlighting applied.
